perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a title card overlaying a view of a Costco shopping cart filled with items, showing promotional dates 12/29-01/04. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on a store shelf or in a refrigerated case. The products include toilet paper, almond cookies, beef slices, pork belly, sanitary pads, chocolate rolls, pork ribs, nugget chocolates, oat biscuits, Pocky sticks, salted egg cookies, granola bars, and more. Each shot features a large text overlay detailing the product name, original price, discount amount, and the final sale price. (3) The sequence continues through various aisles of the warehouse, covering cleaning supplies, frozen food, snacks, and beverages, concluding with red wine and household essentials.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music begins immediately. A male voice enthusiastically introduces the Costco weekly discount report. (2) As each product appears visually, the male narrator quickly reads the product name and its sale price. The timing of the speech is tightly synchronized with the visual transitions. (3) The music maintains a constant high tempo throughout the entire duration, and the narration remains continuous and energetic until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Title Card: 'COSTCO 新年大特優 女子市集 每週特價速報 12/29-01/04 記得追蹤我們' (Costco New Year Special, Women's Market Weekly Sale Report, 12/29-01/04, Remember to follow us). (2) Functional Text: For each item, text like '五月花 妙用棉柔抽取衛生紙' (Mayflower soft tissue), '原價349' (Original price 349), '-70', '特價279' (Sale price 279) appears. (3) Decorative Text: Large colorful labels emphasize the product category and the 'Special Offer' status.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Continuous rapid showcase of discounted products with price details.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Only the hands of the person filming/pushing the cart are occasionally visible; one male voice narrates.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The narrator is off-camera, acting as the primary photographer and presenter.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large Costco warehouse, featuring industrial shelving, refrigerated display cases, and large stacks of palletized products.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a practical shopping guide for Costco customers in Taiwan, aiming to quickly disseminate information about weekly promotions to encourage store visits and social media engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire content is a curated list of product discounts at a specific retail chain.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed price narration, '女子市集' branding logo, synchronized visual-audio cuts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious shoppers looking for efficiency, providing a quick summary of a large number of products in under 90 seconds.
